channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 zats/permiso (372 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zats

📝 Repository: zats/permiso

📄 Descrizione: Permission dialog for accessibility settings as seen in Codex Computer Use https://x.com/lexrus/status/2044929029334245819

⭐ Stelle: 372

🍴 Forks: 25

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-17T02:46:48Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-22T06:09:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 gridex/gridex (304 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: gridex

📝 Repository: gridex/gridex

📄 Descrizione: A native macOS / windows database IDE built with Swift and AppKit. Connect to PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and Redis from a single app with a fast, keyboard-driven interface.

item.title: 📝 godblessamki/Workout-Tracker (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: godblessamki

📝 Repository: godblessamki/Workout-Tracker

📄 Descrizione: IronTrack is a native iOS workout tracker built with SwiftUI and SwiftData. It allows users to create custom workout routines and exercises. During active sessions, it automatically displays the maximum weight and reps from the previous session for instant progress tracking. Designed with MVVM architecture, it offers a fast, local-first experience.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: No license

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-20T23:01:27Z
